results.description: SUPPLY AND INSTALL ALL CABLING, HARDWARE, POWER SUPPLIES, ETC. REQUIRED FOR MOUNTING, WIRING AND INTERFACING. CONTRACTOR SHALL TEST AND DEMONSTRATE USAGE AND FUNCTION UPON COMPLETION. INSTALLATION SHALL BE COMPLETED BY FCC LICENSED TECHNICIAN(S).
